name: SV Meteorites
description: SV Meteorites public inventory with individual specimen detail pages and images.
notes: SV uses category pages for discovery and Meteorite.aspx?id=... pages for individual specimens. Category pages are never emitted as listings.

name: Meteorlab
description: New England Meteoritical Services static catalog pages for larger specimens and micromounts.
notes: Meteorlab has old static catalog pages with multiple specimens per page, so the parser extracts item clusters from known offering pages only.

name: BAITYLIA
description: BAITYLIA / Meteorite and More categorized inventory with individual specimen pages.
notes: BAITYLIA index pages are inventory lists; only detail pages with id=... are emitted as individual listings.

name: Meteorite Exchange
description: WooCommerce meteorite dealer catalog with category pages and .html product detail pages.
notes: Parser start added for WooCommerce product cards and detail metadata. Left disabled pending local row-quality verification across category pages and add-to-cart/filter exclusion.

name: FossilEra
description: Large FossilEra meteorite category with specimen cards, prices, images, and detail pages.
notes: Parser start added for .specimen-listing cards under /meteorites/. Disabled until sold-card filtering, detail-page metadata, and broad mixed-category behavior are verified.

name: Galactic Stone & Ironworks
description: BigCommerce storefront with meteorite product grids, rel=next pagination, and card pricing.
notes: Parser start added for BigCommerce article.card grids and rel=next pagination. Disabled because the category mixes micromounts, collections, jewelry, and out-of-stock cards that need stricter product-type policy.

name: The Meteorite Market
description: Old static meteorite photo catalog with allowlisted sales pages and table-based specimens.
notes: Parser start added for allowlisted static tables with image/id/weight/features/price rows. Disabled until more sales pages are allowlisted and duplicate/sold behavior is locally validated.

name: Arizona Skies Meteorites
description: Mixed static meteorite, fossil, jewelry, and collectible site requiring narrow meteorite allowlists.
notes: Parser start is intentionally narrow and disabled. The home page is highly mixed; lunar/Martian/price-bucket pages need manual verification and respectful crawl delay before enabling.

name: Aerolite Meteorites
description: Large specialist meteorite dealer candidate with authentic meteorites, lunar, Martian, high-end specimens, bulk meteorites, and jewelry.
notes: Disabled backlog candidate. No verified parser exists yet; inspect product-category pages, pagination, sold/out-of-stock markers, and product-detail metadata before enabling.

name: IMPACTIKA
description: Long-running specialist source for rare and historical meteorites sold online and at shows.
notes: Disabled backlog candidate. No verified parser exists yet; inspect static inventory pages and separate active sale specimens from show, archive, educational, and contact pages before enabling.

name: SkyFall Meteorites
description: Specialist meteorite seller and buyer candidate with authenticity guarantees and likely inventory pages.
notes: Disabled backlog candidate. No verified parser exists yet; identify the shop structure and keep buy/sell resources, articles, and non-inventory pages out of listing output.

name: Meteolovers
description: IMCA-certified shop candidate for meteorites, tektites, and related collectibles.
notes: Disabled backlog candidate. No verified parser exists yet; confirm product-card markup, pagination, sold status, and related-collectible filtering before enabling.

name: justMETEORITES
description: Authentic meteorite and impactite dealer candidate with visible sections for Vaca Muerta, Imilac, Monturaqui, and chondrites.
notes: Disabled backlog candidate. No verified parser exists yet; distinguish actual product cards from repeated SEO/category text before enabling.

name: Collector Secret Meteorites
description: Meteorite collection candidate inside a broader minerals ecommerce site with recurring new listings.
notes: Disabled backlog candidate. No verified parser exists yet; restrict parsing to the meteorite collection and filter mineral/category cross-links before enabling.

name: Mini Museum Meteorites
description: Retail meteorite collection candidate with priced products on a Shopify-style collection page.
notes: Disabled backlog candidate. No verified parser exists yet; verify item weights/details and avoid generic gift sets or non-individual lots before enabling.

name: Fossil Realm Meteorite Collection
description: High-end meteorite and mineral collection candidate with specimen details and provenance.
notes: Disabled backlog candidate. No verified parser exists yet; parse product detail pages and filter broader fossil/mineral navigation before enabling.

name: TOP Meteorite
description: Rare and significant meteorite dealer candidate that may include jewelry and high-end specimens.
notes: Disabled backlog candidate. No verified parser exists yet; confirm the active inventory structure and separate individual specimens from jewelry, sets, and informational pages before enabling.

name: The Space Shop Meteorites
description: Retail meteorite product-page candidate for genuine meteorite material.
notes: Disabled backlog candidate. No verified parser exists yet; low priority unless the site exposes individual named and weighted specimens rather than generic lots.
